sections.instruction: if + past perfect simple, would + have + past participle
sections.instruction_ru: if + past perfect simple, would + have + past participle

cells: Unreal situations in the past and their unreal past results

_If the chemist **had been** open, I **would have bought** some aspirin._
( = The chemist wasn't open, so I didn't buy any aspirin.)

_If I **hadn't listened** to you, I **would have cooked** the chicken for too long._
( = I listened to you, so I didn't cook the chicken for too long.)

_If he **had seen** the doctor, he **wouldn't have been** ill for such a long time._
( = He didn't see the doctor, so he was ill for a long time.)

_If you **hadn't eaten** a giant pizza, you **wouldn't have been** sick!_
( = You ate a giant pizza, so you were sick.)
cells_uz: O'tmishdagi haqiqiy bo'lmagan vaziyatlar va ularning haqiqiy bo'lmagan o'tmishdagi natijalari

_If the chemist **had been** open, I **would have bought** some aspirin._
( = Dorixona ochiq emas edi, shuning uchun men aspirin sotib olmadim.)

_If I **hadn't listened** to you, I **would have cooked** the chicken for too long._
( = Men sizni tingladim, shuning uchun tovuqni haddan ziyod pishirmaganman.)

_If he **had seen** the doctor, he **wouldn't have been** ill for such a long time._
( = U shifokorga bormadi, shuning uchun uzoq vaqt kasal bo'ldi.)

_If you **hadn't eaten** a giant pizza, you **wouldn't have been** sick!_
( = Siz katta pizza yedingiz, shuning uchun kasal bo'ldingiz.)
cells_ru: Нереальные ситуации в прошлом и их нереальные прошлые результаты

_If the chemist **had been** open, I **would have bought** some aspirin._
( = Аптека была закрыта, поэтому я не купил аспирин.)

_If I **hadn't listened** to you, I **would have cooked** the chicken for too long._
( = Я послушал вас, поэтому не переготовил курицу.)

_If he **had seen** the doctor, he **wouldn't have been** ill for such a long time._
( = Он не пошёл к врачу, поэтому болел долгое время.)

_If you **hadn't eaten** a giant pizza, you **wouldn't have been** sick!_
( = Вы съели огромную пиццу, поэтому вам было плохо.)

tip.label: Helpful hints
tip.translation:
_would_ o'rniga ma'noga qarab _could_ va _might_ ham ishlatishimiz mumkin.
✓ _If you had eaten a giant pizza, you **might** have been sick!_
( = Ehtimol, siz kasal bo'lgan bo'lardingiz.)

✓ _If Mary had told me she was coming, I **could** have cooked a nice meal._
( = Yaxshi ovqat pishira olgan bo'lardim.)
tip.translation_ru:
_could_ и _might_ также можно использовать вместо _would_, в зависимости от значения.
✓ _If you had eaten a giant pizza, you **might** have been sick!_
( = Это возможно, но не точно, что вы были бы больны.)

✓ _If Mary had told me she was coming, I **could** have cooked a nice meal._
( = Я мог бы приготовить хорошую еду.)

tip.label: Watch out!
tip.translation:
• Third conditional — o'tmishga ishora qiladigan yagona shartli gapdir.
✓ _If I **had had** a headache, I would have taken an aspirin._ ( = o'tmishda)

• Second conditional esa o'tmishga ishora qilmaydi.
✓ _If I **had** a headache, I would take an aspirin._ ( = hozir yoki odatda)

• Second conditional haqida ko'proq ma'lumot olish uchun 28-mavzuga qarang.
tip.translation_ru:
• Third conditional — единственное условное предложение, которое относится к прошлому.
✓ _If I **had had** a headache, I would have taken an aspirin._ ( = в прошлом)

• Second conditional не относится к прошлому.
✓ _If I **had** a headache, I would take an aspirin._ ( = сейчас или вообще)

• Для получения дополнительной информации о second conditional смотрите урок 28.
